doctrine: CPU-only, no GPU/CUDA dependencies. numpy + scipy + Pillow + ffmpeg only.
novelty_summary: Tier-aware splat dispatch (A/B/C) and per-splat phoxoidal density evaluation, plus q8-EXACT SH reconstruction from v28 archive — neither feature exists in vanilla 3DGS renderers.

tier_1_improvements_vs_v0_2.1_1_halo_fix: Per-pixel alpha threshold at 1/255 + radius cull at 1/16 of image side + reduced cov dilation (0.3 -> 0.1). Prevented ~167x per-pixel splat overlap from washing the image to white. Culled 7,000 oversized degenerate splats that touched 600+ tiles each.
tier_1_improvements_vs_v0_2.1_2_q8_exact_sh: Decoded SH from v28 archive (VQ codebook + per-tier-group residual chunks) instead of v28 render container (VQ-only). Result: PSNR vs PLY jumps from 38.76 dB (VQ-only) to 56.33 dB (EXACT) — 17 dB improvement, visually indistinguishable from PLY.
tier_1_improvements_vs_v0_2.1_3_supersampling: Render at 2x target resolution then Lanczos-downsample. Sharper edges, smoother anti-aliasing on splat boundaries.

deliverables.headline: SHOWCASE_T1_final.png — hero supersampled image + 3-way comparison + file size chart
deliverables.hero_image: v28_archive_200k_side_512_SS.png — supersampled Audi A5 from v28 EXACT archive
deliverables.comparison_strip: SHOWCASE_T12_archive_vs_render.png — PLY | v28 archive | v28 render side-by-side
deliverables.tier_overlay: v28_tier_overlay_200k.png — A=red B=green C=blue surface vs halo decomposition

honest_caveats.subsample: 200,000 splats subsampled from 763,800 total (the full-density render at this camera angle exceeded the bash sandbox's per-call time limit; subsample shows the model recognizably).
honest_caveats.y_flip_correction: Renders saved by chunked driver are upside-down (Y convention mismatch); flipped at presentation time.
honest_caveats.phoxoidal_path: Tier 1 used the gaussian-mode dispatch (every tier -> Gaussian path) for the comparison metrics. Tier 2 will exercise the phoxoidal Tier A/B paths and produce qualitatively different visuals.
honest_caveats.supersampling_only_at_subsample: The 1024 -> 512 supersample was only run at the 200k subsample because the full 763k at 1024 exceeded sandbox time.

tier_2_plan: Replace screen-space phoxoidal density approximation with faithful per-pixel closest-point Newton solve on the germ surface.
Add cubic Pearcey-class germ basis terms (cusps, twists, folds — the real catastrophe-optics math from the thesis).
Refit germs with the richer basis.
PhoxBench Tier 0 stress scenes: plane, sphere, saddle, fold, cusp, thin sheet, crossing sheets, occlusion edge.
A/B vs Gaussian baseline on each scene; report primitives-needed-to-equal-quality.
tier_3_plan: Either heavy numpy optimization (tile-batched rasterization, ~10x speedup target) for ~30 fps at 512^2 in pure Python.
Or a separate WebGL viewer that loads .3dphox client-side. Viewer uses GPU shaders client-side; CRYPSOID codebase stays GPU-free.
